#  View a Submittal Package 
##  Background 
A _submittal package_ is a container that stores one or more _submittals_. Typically, a _general contractor_ creates submittal packages that list all of the individual submittals specific to a particular trade or _subcontractor_. For example, one might create a submittal package to contain all of the plumbing-related submittals in a commercial building project.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher on the project's Submittals tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Some image attachments may include the option to view them in a map view based on the files' GPS coordinates. See [Which Procore tools let me view digital image attachments in a map view?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-let-me-view-a-digital-image-attachment-in-a-map-view)


##  Steps​ 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.
  2. Click **Packages**.
  3. Locate the submittal package and click **View**.


## See Also
  * [Distribute the Submittals in a Package](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/distribute-the-submittals-in-a-package)
  * [What granular permissions are available for the project's Submittals tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-granular-permissions-are-available-for-the-projects-submittals-tool)
  * [Best Practices: Submittal Packages - Submittal Itemization](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-submittal-packages-submittal-itemization)
title: View a Submittal Package
description: How to view a submittal package using the Project level Submittals tool.
